summary: Custom Subscription Builder feature - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 17/17 backend tests passed, E2E frontend tests passed.

notes.note: Checkout redirect goes to homepage since /checkout/{plan_id} route doesn't exist yet - expected behavior for MVP

action_items: Consider implementing /checkout/{plan_id} route for Stripe payment integration
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing calculation correctly applies 20% annual discount
Service validation in /create endpoint properly checks service_registry collection
MongoDB _id excluded from responses using projection {'_id': 0}
Added data-testid attributes for better testability
test_credentials: No auth required for custom subscription endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test subscriptions created with TEST_ prefix user IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom subscription system fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/subscriptions/custom/available-services (GET), /api/subscriptions/custom/calculate-pricing (POST), /api/subscriptions/custom/create (POST), /api/subscriptions/custom/user/{user_id} (GET), /api/subscriptions/custom/{plan_id} (DELETE). Frontend at /subscriptions/custom with service selection, billing cycle toggle, real-time pricing updates. Pricing: $49 base + per-service fees, 20% annual discount.
passed_tests: Frontend: Page loads with all 7 services displayed
Frontend: Service selection updates pricing in real-time
Frontend: Continue to Checkout button enabled when services selected
